scope: Large board-impact batch covering the next 50 pending players after batch 012, excluding prior research rows and rows without a confirmed current team in the local projection export.
method: Skip rows already present in earlier player research batches.
Skip rows whose current-team field is blank in the projection export.
Prioritize remaining pending rows by historical rating after applying local batch 012 state.
Use local player-type, class, historical anchor, and current-team context for initial scoring.
Keep every row pending admin approval so official roster, signing, and role evidence can be reviewed before application.

formulas.projectedBbprWithHistory: historicalRating/proven production blended with projection score, then calibrated by player type

teamContextRubric.projectedStarter: Yes requires returner/transfer profile plus a plausible path to starter or closing-lineup minutes; Uncertain means rotation value without locked starting signal; No means depth/bench role.
teamContextRubric.projectedRole: 88-92 for strong starter/closing cases, 82-87 for likely starters or high-minute rotation players, 76-81 for uncertain rotation players with role caps.
teamContextRubric.opportunityChange: Rewards open usage, transfer fit, or retained-program opportunity; penalizes crowded high-major rotations and uncertain immediate translation.
teamContextRubric.offensiveBurden: Primary/secondary scorers and creators get 82+; defensive bigs, connectors, and low-usage wings stay lower.
teamContextRubric.roleEvidence: Every row includes why starter credit was assigned or capped and remains pending for official verification.
